verified.notes: Income limit derived from official state plan stating eligibility up to 200% of federal poverty level. Using 2025 federal poverty guidelines (200% of $1,000/month for individual = $2,000/month; 200% of $1,350/month for couple = $2,700/month), rounded to nearest integer. Phone number is for James Whitaker, Weatherization Program Manager at Better Community Development, Inc., a primary service provider. No age restriction found in official sources. No asset limits specified in available documentation. Program is current and operational for PY 2025-26 (July 1, 2025 – June 30, 2026).

Phone number is for James Whitaker, Weatherization Program Manager at Better Community Development, Inc., a primary service provider. No age restriction found in official sources. verified.notes: SMP is an outreach and education program with no eligibility requirements (age, income, or asset limits). It serves Medicare beneficiaries, families, and caregivers through volunteer-led fraud prevention education. SHIP (State Health Insurance Program) is a separate counseling program; contact number for SHIP is 1-800-224-6330. Phone number provided is for SMP services in Arkansas.
